description: Expand extract_script_references() to match relative paths (./path, ../path) and bare interpreter invocations (bash scripts/foo.sh)
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/skill_common.rs and locate extract_script_references() function
Add Pattern 2: regex matching for relative path references starting with ./ or ../ terminated by whitespace, quotes, backtick, or closing paren
Add Pattern 3: regex matching for bare script invocations after known interpreters (bash|sh|python|python3|node|ruby|perl) where the path contains a directory separator or known extension
Add URL exclusion logic to avoid matching https:// or http:// paths
Add deduplication via sort() and dedup() on the results Vec
Add unit test: extract_variable_prefix — existing ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/scripts/helper.sh pattern still works
Add unit test: extract_relative_dot_slash — ./scripts/helper.sh matched
Add unit test: extract_relative_dot_dot — ../utils/lib.sh matched
Add unit test: extract_bare_invocation — bash scripts/deploy.sh matched
Add unit test: extract_ignores_urls — https://example.com/scripts/foo.sh NOT matched
Add unit test: extract_deduplicates — same path referenced twice returns one entry
Run cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Add script reference extraction to AgentDetector and CopilotAgentDetector (parity with SkillDetector)
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/agent_detector.rs and locate the referenced_scripts: Vec::new() line
Replace with extract_script_references(&content, "${CLAUDE_AGENT_DIR}") call
Add use crate::migrate::skill_common::extract_script_references import if not present
Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/copilot_agent_detector.rs and apply the same change
Add unit test: agent_detects_script_refs — agent .md with ${CLAUDE_AGENT_DIR}/scripts/tool.sh populates referenced_scripts
Add unit test: agent_no_scripts — agent .md with no script references returns empty referenced_scripts
Run cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Add OtherFile type to mod.rs and create the reconciler module for identifying unclaimed files
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs to understand existing types
Add OtherFile struct with fields: path (PathBuf), relative_path (PathBuf), associated_artifact (Option<String>), is_external (bool)
Add pub mod reconciler to mod.rs
Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/reconciler.rs
Implement collect_all_files() using recursive directory walk pattern from skill_common::collect_files_recursive(), returning absolute paths
Implement build_claimed_set() that iterates artifacts, adding source_path and resolved files to a HashSet. Account for config-based artifacts (McpServer, Hook) claiming settings.json
Implement associate_with_artifacts() that checks each unclaimed file against artifact referenced_scripts and metadata.raw_content for matches
Implement the main reconcile(source_dir, artifacts, fs) function composing the above steps
Add path canonicalization and traversal safety checks (reject files resolving outside source directory boundary)
Add unit test: reconcile_empty_dir — empty source dir returns empty other files
Add unit test: reconcile_all_claimed — all files claimed by detectors yields no other files
Add unit test: reconcile_unclaimed_files — files not matching any detector returned as other files
Add unit test: reconcile_associated_dependency — unclaimed file referenced in skill content has associated_artifact set
Add unit test: reconcile_unassociated — unclaimed file not referenced has associated_artifact as None
Add unit test: reconcile_external_reference — reference to file outside source dir has is_external: true
Add unit test: reconcile_settings_json_claimed — settings.json claimed by McpDetector/HookDetector not in other files
Run cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Integrate reconciler into the migrate orchestrator (both single-source and recursive paths)
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs and locate migrate_single_source() around line 324
Add other_files field (Vec<OtherFile>) to PluginPlan struct
In migrate_single_source(), after artifact detection and before the dry-run/emit branch, call reconciler::reconcile(&source_dir, &artifacts, fs)
Thread other_files through to generate_report() and emit paths
In migrate_recursive() after parallel detection around line 447, iterate plugin_plans and call reconciler::reconcile() for each plan
Ensure PluginPlan is initialized with other_files: Vec::new() before reconciliation
Run cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Add dry-run report section for other files with warning markers
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/dry_run.rs and understand generate_report() and generate_recursive_report() signatures
Update generate_report() signature to accept &[OtherFile] parameter
Update generate_recursive_report() to access other_files from PluginPlan
Implement write_other_files_section() that groups files into three categories: dependencies (associated), unassociated (with warning markers), and external references
Add the other files section call in generate_report() after existing artifact sections
Add the other files section call in generate_recursive_report() for each plan's other_files
Update the summary table to include an 'Other files' count row
Add unit test: report_no_other_files — no warning section when all files classified
Add unit test: report_with_associated_files — Dependencies section lists associated files
Add unit test: report_with_unassociated_files — Unassociated section with warning markers
Add unit test: report_with_external_refs — External section with rewrite notice
Update all existing callers of generate_report() and generate_recursive_report() to pass other_files
Run cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Add emission of other files into plugin directories and path rewriting for external references
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/emitter.rs and understand emit_plugin(), emit_plugin_with_name(), emit_package_plugin() signatures
Implement emit_other_files(other_files, plugin_dir, fs) that copies associated files to relative path under plugin root, unassociated files to plugin root (filename only), and skips external files
Add file name collision detection for unassociated files placed at plugin root — suffix with -1, -2 etc. on collision
Implement rewrite_external_references(content, artifact_new_dir, external_refs, project_root) that computes relative path from new location to external file and replaces old reference strings
Integrate emit_other_files() call into emit_plugin() after existing script copying
Integrate emit_other_files() call into emit_plugin_with_name() after existing emission
Integrate emit_other_files() call into emit_package_plugin() after existing emission
Integrate rewrite_external_references() into skill emission path (SKILL.md content)
Integrate rewrite_external_references() into agent emission path (agent .md content)
Extend rewrite_hook_command_paths() to handle external reference path rewriting for hooks
Add OtherFileMigrated action variant to Action enum in mod.rs with fields: path, destination, associated_artifact
Add ExternalReferenceRewritten action variant to Action enum with fields: path, referenced_by
Collect OtherFileMigrated and ExternalReferenceRewritten actions during emission
Add unit test: emit_associated_other_file — associated file placed in relative path under plugin dir
Add unit test: emit_unassociated_other_file — unassociated file placed in plugin root
Add unit test: emit_skips_external — external files not copied
Add unit test: rewrite_external_skill_ref — skill content path rewritten to valid relative path
Add unit test: rewrite_external_agent_ref — agent content path rewritten to valid relative path
Add unit test: rewrite_external_hook_ref — hook command path rewritten to valid path
Run cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Update cleanup to include migrated other files in the destructive cleanup set
steps: Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/cleanup.rs and understand remove_migrated_sources() and should_skip_for_report()
Read crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs Outcome::migrated_sources() method
Update migrated_sources() or add migrated_other_files() method on Outcome to also return OtherFileMigrated action paths
Ensure remove_migrated_sources() includes other file source paths when cleaning up after --destructive migration
Update write_cleanup_plan() in dry_run.rs to include other files in the cleanup listing
Run cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Add cmd_migrate CLI output handling for new OtherFileMigrated and ExternalReferenceRewritten actions
steps: Read crates/aipm/src/main.rs cmd_migrate() function around line 617
Add match arms for Action::OtherFileMigrated — print file path and destination, noting if associated with an artifact
Add match arms for Action::ExternalReferenceRewritten — print warning about external file and which artifact references it
Ensure output uses writeln!() to stderr for warnings (not println which is denied by lint policy)
Run cargo test --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Add E2E integration tests for other files migration scenarios
steps: Read crates/aipm/tests/migrate_e2e.rs to understand existing test patterns and helpers
Add test: migrate with other files present — set up .claude/ with a skill and extra files (README.md, utils/helper.sh), run aipm migrate, verify files appear in plugin directory
Add test: migrate with dependency script referenced by skill — skill content references ./scripts/deploy.sh, verify script migrated alongside skill
Add test: migrate with external reference — skill references ../../scripts/build.sh, verify warning printed and path rewritten in migrated content but file not copied
Add test: dry-run with other files — verify report includes the warning Other Files section with correct groupings
Run cargo test --workspace

description: Add BDD cucumber scenarios for other files migration behavior
steps: Read tests/features/manifest/migrate.feature to understand existing scenario patterns
Read crates/libaipm/tests/bdd.rs to understand existing step definitions around line 691
Add BDD scenario: Dry run reports unclassified files with warnings — Given .claude with skill and extra files, When --dry-run, Then report contains Other Files section
Add BDD scenario: Dry run reports dependency files associated with parent artifact — Given skill referencing ./scripts/deploy.sh, When --dry-run, Then report lists as dependency
Add BDD scenario: Unassociated files moved to plugin root — Given .claude with skill and README.md, When migrate, Then README.md at plugin root
Add BDD scenario: Dependency files migrated alongside parent — Given skill referencing ./scripts/deploy.sh, When migrate, Then scripts/deploy.sh in plugin dir
Add BDD scenario: External file reference produces warning and path rewrite — Given skill referencing ../../scripts/build.sh, When migrate, Then file not copied but path rewritten
Add BDD scenario: Agent with script reference migrates the script — Given agent referencing ./scripts/lint.sh, When migrate, Then scripts/lint.sh in plugin dir
Add step definitions in bdd.rs for any new Given/When/Then steps not already covered
Run cargo test --workspace

description: Run all cargo gates and verify branch coverage meets 89% threshold
steps: Run cargo build --workspace — must pass with zero warnings
Run cargo test --workspace — all tests must pass
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings — must pass with zero warnings
Run cargo fmt --check — must pass with no formatting issues
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov clean --workspace
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov --no-report --workspace --branch
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov --no-report --doc
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov report --doctests --branch --ignore-filename-regex '(tests/|research/|specs/|wizard_tty\.rs)'
Verify TOTAL line branch column shows >= 89%
If coverage is below 89%, identify uncovered branches and add targeted tests to reach the threshold
